channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Econet Zimbabwe invests USD 200mln to boost network capacity
item.description: Econet Zimbabwe invests USD 200mln to boost network capacity — via Telecompaper #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Telecompaper

item.title: Defending champion Argentina reaches World Cup final by beating England 2-1
item.description: ATLANTA — Lionel Messi delivered for his teammates. With one more win, he’ll be delivering another World Cup trophy to Argentina. Messi didn’t add to his tournament-leading goal total, but the 39-year-old assisted on two late strikes that carried La Albiceleste to another stunnin #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Zambia’s former vice president Guy Scott dies at 82
item.description: LUSAKA, Zambia – Zambia’s former Vice President Guy Scott, who in 2014 became Africa’s ​first white head of state ‌in two decades when he briefly served as acting president, has died at the age ​of 82, the government said ​on Wednesday. Scott died in Lusaka at his ⁠farm in the Leopards Hill area ​after an [...] The post Zambia’s former vice president Guy Scott dies at 82 appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: MCAZ Engages Influencers Over Illegal Medicine Promotions on Social Media @263Chat
item.description: By Kudzaishe Chimonera The Medicines Control Authority of Zimbabwe (MCAZ) has launched an awareness campaign targeting content creators, social media influencers, celebrities and bloggers amid growing concern over the illegal promotion of medicines on digital platforms. MCAZ Public Relations and Communications Manager Davidson Kaiyo said [...] The post MCAZ Engages Influencers Over Illegal Medicine Promotions on Social Media appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Zimbabwe crush Bangladesh to continue winning streak @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe’s senior men’s cricket team made an impressive start to the three-match Twenty20 International (T20I) series after defeating Bangladesh by 32 runs at Queens Sports Club on Wednesday to take a... #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s future lies in strong local value chains @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwe’s economic debate has, for decades, been dominated by one recurring question: How do we industrialise?The answers have often focused on attracting foreign direct investment, securing internat... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Comedian Mai Clifford Banned From Driving @263Chat
item.description: By Kudzaishe Chimonera Comedian and social media personality Theophilus Gabriel Chigumira, popularly known as Mai Clifford has been fined US$200 or the ZiG equivalent and banned from driving for six months after pleading guilty to driving under the influence of alcohol. According #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: NACZ Defends Thomas Mapfumo’s US$1 Million Deal as Zimbabwe Awaits Music Legend’s Return
item.description: NACZ Hails Thomas Mapfumo’s Zimbabwe Return as Major Win for the Arts Industry The National Arts Council of Zimbabwe (NACZ) has welcomed Chimurenga music legend Thomas “Mukanya” Mapfumo’s decision to return to Zimbabwe for performances later this year. The council described the h #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: The Master Builder and the Maestro: Mandla Ndebele’s symphonic execution of the WestProp Vision @nehandaradio
item.description: While Ken Sharpe provides the vision, Mandla Ndebele is ensuring WestProp delivers. As Chief Projects Officer, he is overseeing the execution of multi-billion-dollar developments shaping the future of Zimbabwe’s cities. The post The Master Builder and the Maestro: Mandla Ndebele’s symphonic execution of the WestProp Vision appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Full text of statement by Thomas Mapfumo: ‘My beliefs remain unchanged, I have not sold out’ @nehandaradio @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Thomas \"Mukanya\" Mapfumo has defended his decision to accept Wicknell Chivayo’s gift, insisting he remains a human rights activist and has not abandoned the principles that defined his decades-long career. The post Full text of statement by Thomas Mapfumo: ‘My beliefs remain unch #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: MetroPeach cashier steals US$49k, loses it all to betting @bulawayo24
item.description: A Bindura‐based MetroPeach cashier has been jailed after stealing US$49,000 from his employer and blowing the money on betting.Peter Muza was sentenced to eight years in prison by Bindura magistrate R... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: ZIFA suspends five referees over controversial match decisions
item.description: Five ZIFA referees face suspension following disputed match decisions, as football authorities crack down on officiating errors across Zimbabwe leagues. The post ZIFA suspends five referees over controversial match decisions appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: ZRP arrests over 2,000 suspects as nationwide crime crackdown gathers pace
item.description: ZRP’s sweeping nationwide crackdown nets over 2,000 suspects, revealing the scale of ongoing efforts to restore law and public safety. The post ZRP arrests over 2,000 suspects as nationwide crime crackdown gathers pace appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe prepares for more returnees as South Africa repatriation programme expands
item.description: Zimbabwe braces for more returning citizens as South Africa expands its repatriation programme, raising fresh questions about migration, jobs, and reintegration. The post Zimbabwe prepares for more returnees as South Africa repatriation programme expands appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Another Giant Shopping Mall Closes
